nav.scannerHint: Scanner sends Enter after each scan — field stays focused for rapid checkout.

topbar.searchPlaceholder: Search products by name or barcode…

auth.signInSubtitle: POS, inventory, and reports for your pharmacy
auth.mfaSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your app (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, etc.)
auth.forgotSubtitle: We will email a reset link if an account exists for this address.
auth.resetSent: If that email is registered, you will receive reset instructions shortly.
auth.resetSubtitle: Use at least 8 characters with letters and numbers.
auth.resetSuccess: Password updated — you can sign in
auth.verifySuccess: Email verified — you can sign in
auth.resendHint: Didn’t get the email? Check spam or resend from the sign-in page.

register.verifyPrompt: Check your email to verify your address, then sign in.
register.fixErrors: Please fix validation errors before continuing
register.title: Register your pharmacy
register.subtitle: One account per pharmacy — data stays isolated

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Suppliers, security, and workspace
settings.mfaSubtitle: Protect admin sign-in with a time-based code from an authenticator app.
settings.mfaEnabled: MFA is enabled for your account.
settings.otpUriHint: Or scan the QR code in your app using this setup key URL.
settings.mfaSetupLoaded: Secret generated — add it to your app, then enter a code to enable.
settings.emailPendingBody: Some actions may be limited until you verify your email. Check your inbox or resend the link from sign-in.
settings.resendVerificationToast: If verification is still pending, check your inbox (and spam).

landing.heroSubtitle: Inventory, POS, batches, and reports — built for modern pharmacies.
landing.heroLead: Run and scale your pharmacy with a secure, multi-tenant platform built for efficiency, compliance-ready workflows, and growth.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Today at a glance
dashboard.cashierHint: Use POS for scanning and checkout. Browse Products when you need to look something up.
dashboard.welcomeLead: Today's performance, stock signals, and shortcuts—everything you need to run the floor in one glance.

pos.title: Point of sale
pos.subtitle: Add from the catalog table or scan below. Cart stays in view on large screens and appears under the scanner on smaller ones.
pos.scanHint: USB scanner types here — stays focused after each add
pos.scanPlaceholder: Scan or type barcode, then Enter
pos.catalogHint: Full details · horizontal scroll on narrow screens
pos.filterPlaceholder: Search name, barcode, category, supplier, description…
pos.cartEmptyHelp: Use Add in the catalog or scan a barcode
pos.f2Hint: F2 focuses scan · Enter adds scanned line
pos.noProductsBody: Add products under Products so they appear here for checkout.
